question: Find artists with 'Simone' in their name.
sparql:

SELECT ?artist ?label WHERE { VALUES ?artist { <http://data.doremus.org/artist/ade1b146-6344-3fcd-9d6f-8f7dfe1692da> <http://data.doremus.org/artist/00674d92-6d2b-3962-958d-5b19bdb26348> } ?artist rdfs:label ?label }
